flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Arkansas State University Mid-South are 7% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($31.9k vs $34.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Arkansas State University Mid-South fell 43% between 2009 and 2010 (3.5% → 2.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Arkansas State University Mid-South vs the 2018–2022 baseline (435 vs 559).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Arkansas State University Mid-South rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.7k → $3.2k).
